MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: A single consumable item (Drink or Food) in the lounge's menu.

id.description: Unique identifier of the menu item.

name.description: Name of the food or drink drink.

description.description: Subtle, descriptive prose about the item.

regularPrice.description: Standard shelf price for general public.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded string or external public URL of the item image.

SiteConfig.title: SiteConfig
SiteConfig.description: Global custom configurations for Vibe Yard brand assets.

logoUrl.description: Custom text name or Base64 encoded logo image.

banners.description: Ordered lists of custom banners image/text entries.

/menu.description: Persistence path for lounge food and drinks menu items.

/site-config/global.description: Single-document path containing active brand assets and configs.
